roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION ADDRESS SHERIFF EM FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO MODIFY ELECTRONIC MONITORING/EMMOD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THEDEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WEAP/CTORD: THE CURFEW OF 9PM-6AM ORDERED 09-02-21 VACATED/CTORD: THE ORMS RELEASE ORDER OF 09-02-21 VACATED/ACM/X: THE 09-15-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE IS CONFIRMED/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:09-16-21/987,2/ORMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT COMPLY WITH A CURFEW BETWEEN 9:00PM AND 6:00AM/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:50 YARDSFROM EDDY DE LEON; CLARA DIAZ; ROGER SIERRA/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
